name: Vaibhav Dubey
quote: I am immensely gratified by the GenAI program offered by Coding Ninjas. The curriculum was thoughtfully designed to cover all essential topics, from prompt engineering to building production-ready applications.

name: Priya Menon
quote: The structured approach and 1:1 doubt support made all the difference. Within 3 months of completing the course, I landed my dream role at Amazon. The placement team was incredibly supportive.

name: Rahul Sharma
quote: Coding Ninjas helped me transition from a non-tech background to a data analyst role at Google. The hands-on projects and mock interviews prepared me thoroughly for the recruitment process.

name: Sneha Patel
quote: The Data Science program exceeded my expectations. The faculty from IIT Madras brought real-world experience to every lecture. I especially loved the capstone project that I could showcase in interviews.

name: Arjun Krishnan
quote: The MERN stack course was exactly what I needed. The AI code editor feature helped me debug faster, and the community support through the 10X Club kept me motivated throughout the journey.

name: Ananya Gupta
quote: Coming from a commerce background, I was nervous about coding. But the teaching methodology at Coding Ninjas made complex concepts easy to understand. Now I work at Uber as a Product Analyst!
